description: This skill is used to curate content by uploading a CSV file, selecting content for four slots, uploading images for each slot, and adding a comment. It then saves and applies the layout.

parameters.name: csv_file_path
parameters.semantic: The path to the CSV file containing the curation data.
parameters.source_hint: CSV file uploaded by the user

parameters.name: slot_1_content_id
parameters.semantic: The ID of the content to be displayed in slot 1.

parameters.name: slot_2_content_id
parameters.semantic: The ID of the content to be displayed in slot 2.

parameters.name: slot_3_content_id
parameters.semantic: The ID of the content to be displayed in slot 3.

parameters.name: slot_1_image_file_path
parameters.semantic: The path to the image file for slot 1.
parameters.source_hint: Image file uploaded by the user

parameters.name: slot_2_image_file_path
parameters.semantic: The path to the image file for slot 2.
parameters.source_hint: Image file uploaded by the user

parameters.name: slot_4_content_id
parameters.semantic: The ID of the content to be displayed in slot 4.

parameters.name: slot_3_image_file_path
parameters.semantic: The path to the image file for slot 3.
parameters.source_hint: Image file uploaded by the user

parameters.name: slot_4_image_file_path
parameters.semantic: The path to the image file for slot 4.
parameters.source_hint: Image file uploaded by the user

parameters.name: curation_comment
parameters.semantic: A comment added to the curation.

preconditions: The user is logged in and has the necessary permissions to curate content.
The CSV file is in the correct format and contains the required data.

success_assertions.text: The curation has been successfully saved and applied.
The content has been correctly displayed in each slot.
The images have been correctly uploaded for each slot.
The comment has been added to the curation.
